data.title: 国际服违规账号封禁 #64
data.summary: [5/27 (Wed) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-g
data.body:
[5/27 (Wed) Ban Notice]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Total/Grand Assault.

▶ Total number of players banned: 26
▶ Period: Permanent
▶ More details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=3453604
![It1o4KAVh5oGmAnAJqRWE4vLY0MRGxxM.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/15978/gmfJEkoRhJFSzITA8HPJaDzHhrLgTD5H.jpg)
